title: Infinitely large, randomly wired sensors cannot predict their input unless they are close to deterministic
author: Sarah Marzen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p3kdqkw

steps.instruction: Attached are the python and numpy files that were used to make the figures. rvodt_sparse.py rvodt_figs.py locally_optimal_fsms.py rvodt_full_ivsn.npz rvodt_sparse2_ivsn.npz rvodt_bias.py rvodt_bias_ivsn.npz rvodt_sparse_ivsn.npz
